Milwaukee will begin running it's
through trains from Chicago to Sc.
attic during the coming summer.


Several score Spokane companies
are included in the list of $4,000
corporations returned delinquent at
Olympia for the nonpayment OF
the state corporation tax. If the
tax is not paid by February 90 the
corporations will be stricken from
the rolls and barred from doing
business in the state.


II. G. Bedwell, member of the
Order of Railway Trainmen at
Spokane, with a sister residing at
IIillyard, tried to commit suicide by
taking laudanum in hotel at Bill
lings, Mont. night before last. The
Billings police broke into his room
yesterday and found him in a semi
conscious state. 1t is believed that
he will recover. He was employed
1T Billings as switchman.


The Washington Brick G. Lime
company of Spokane has purchased
the plant of the w. G. Hunt Brick
company at Standpoint, Idaho, for
100000. With the deal goes 20
acres of land near the Great North
m depot in Standpoint and a hotel


A force of IS men have been


tarted by Foreman Gilmore of the


treet department cleaning cross
Valks.


The Spokane Toilet Supply COM
pany has filed legal protest at the
city hall against the proposed
change of grade in Front avenue
near the Schade brewery and
against the granting of a franchise
